query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `support_tickets` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`ticketNo` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`customerName` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
	`customerEmail` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`customerNo` varchar(32),
	`userId` int,
	`productModel` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`purchaseDate` varchar(32),
	`orderNumber` varchar(128),
	`errorCode` varchar(64),
	`problemDescription` text NOT NULL,
	`status` enum('pending','reviewing','resolved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
	`adminDiagnosis` text,
	`adminSolution` text,
	`replacementDecision` enum('none','partial','full'),
	`adminId` int,
	`resolvedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `support_tickets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `support_tickets_ticketNo_unique` UNIQUE(`ticketNo`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ticket_attachments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`ticketId` int NOT NULL,
	`fileKey` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
	`fileUrl` text NOT NULL,
	`fileName` varchar(256),
	`fileType` varchar(64),
	`fileSize` int,
	`attachmentType` enum('video','photo','other') DEFAULT 'other',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `ticket_attachments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ticket_messages` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`ticketId` int NOT NULL,
	`senderRole` enum('admin','customer') NOT NULL,
	`senderName` varchar(128),
	`content` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `ticket_messages_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `customers` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`customerNo` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
	`companyName` varchar(256),
	`contactName` varchar(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(64),
	`customerType` enum('regular','dealer','vip','aftersales') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'aftersales',
	`salesRep` varchar(128),
	`qualificationStatus` enum('pending','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'approved',
	`qualificationNotes` text,
	`passwordHash` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
	`passwordChanged` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`activationToken` varchar(128),
	`activationTokenExpiresAt` timestamp,
	`status` enum('pending_activation','active','suspended','locked') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending_activation',
	`loginFailCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`lockedUntil` timestamp,
	`productModel` varchar(64),
	`orderNumber` varchar(128),
	`purchaseDate` varchar(32),
	`adminNotes` text,
	`createdByAdminId` int,
	`createdByAdminName` varchar(128),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`firstLoginAt` timestamp,
	`lastLoginAt` timestamp,
	`passwordChangedAt` timestamp,
	CONSTRAINT `customers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `customers_customerNo_unique` UNIQUE(`customerNo`),
	CONSTRAINT `customers_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `customer_logs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`customerId` int NOT NULL,
	`action` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
	`description` text NOT NULL,
	`performedBy` varchar(128),
	`ipAddress` varchar(64),
	`metadata` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `customer_logs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
